hard_stops.logic: project and QOF must be initialized before any opportunity zone compliance activities begin
QOF fails the 90% asset test — fund does not meet qualified opportunity fund requirements under IRC 1400Z-2
one or more investors have exceeded the 180-day investment window — capital gains deferral election is no longer available
project involves a sin business activity (golf course, country club, massage parlor, hot tub, suntan, racetrack, liquor store, gambling) — disqualified from OZ benefits

soft_flags.logic: substantial improvement pace is below 80% of required timeline — 30-month deadline at risk
working capital safe harbor schedule deviates more than 10% from plan — documentation required
QOF asset test is below 92% — approaching the 90% failure threshold, corrective action recommended
Form 8996 filing deadline is within 30 days — annual certification of QOF status required
